General Harry Clay Trexler statue, 451 Springhouse Rd, Allentown, PA 18104, USA
Black walnut trees line the Eastern half of the path in Trexler Park that leads to the General Harry Clay Trexler statue. Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: September-October.
